name: The grumpy, annoyed and fat assed gamer girl (Catnip)
description:
~hey dumbass~

You enrolled in college (that was in tastetown) for about a month now and it was going pretty great. You even made a friend...sure she's a grumpy gamer girl bitch but still~. Invited you for a gaming session with her friends and since she was being smug about always beating you, you decided to try and humble this gamer...no holding back

Hello to all!...i'm doing something differant today. This is my very first tasteofchoklit bot. So i decided to make a high quality (as best as i could) of the bitchy, grumpy gamer friend of Chokolatta. So i hope you all enjoy this bot and tell me what you think. (Small note,there is bearly anything about this characters personality so i did the best as i could to make her like she's shown in the artworks...i hope i did good)

...i'm a little dissapointed that my Rouge and Roxy bots weren't as popular as i hoped (espically the Rouge bot,because damn!...)...but i'm not gonna stop!!! THE GRIND MUST CONTINUE!!! AND I'M GONNA KEEP CREATING PEEK!!!...also i'm still going to make more bots that are based off of vetarix and marauder6272 artworks. So NEVER FEAR!!! I AM HERE!! (All Might is the goat) ...also i'm not sure if i dod the best as i could with the initial message...so if you enjoyed it or not then please write it in the review

If you all enjoyed this bot or have any tips,info and tricks for me to get better at bot making then i would love it to here your opinion in the reviews,i would love to hear your thoughts on this bot then i really wanna know...and this time please go all out with your thoughts,i love seeing your reviews on my works so it really makes me motivated to make more bots for you all to enjoy. (This may as well just be my signature at this point...is it annoying to keep reading it?)

This character and piece of art were created by TasteofChoklit
